a proportion of the amount of 
imputed costs beyond the threshold. CMS calculates the imputed cost for each 30-day 
period by first taking the national per-visit payment amounts for each discipline and 
calculating per-unit payment amounts (1 unit = 15 minutes). The per-unit amounts are 
then multiplied by the number of units in the discipline and computing the total imputed 
cost for all disciplines (summed across the six disciplines of care).
